prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated 3S-GTE Gen 3 (specifically the '93-'98 variant with 260 PS @ 6,200 RPM and 324 Nm @ 4,400 RPM) paired with a Garrett GT2860-5 turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe, and a Tomei 260° camshaft set for optimized high-RPM power delivery.

Full bolt-on internals upgrade including JUN forged pistons (87mm, 9.0:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-M 85mm stroker crankshaft to achieve a 2.2L displacement, mated to a TODA Racing 1.5mm head gasket and ARP head studs for maximum reliability under boost.

Custom ECU remapping via Haltech Elite 2500 with individual cylinder fuel trims, dual MAP sensor inputs (for turbo and post-intercooler pressure), and a 4D ignition timing table optimized for 98 RON fuel, paired with a HKS Super Power Flow Type-R intercooler and a custom 3-core aluminum radiator from Koyorad for consistent intake temps.

Chassis reinforcement via TRD Japan 4-point strut tower bar (part #53601-12020), Cusco 2-point lower arm brace, and a full seam-welded subframe with polyurethane bushings from Whiteline (part #W51210) to eliminate torque steer and improve suspension geometry under hard acceleration.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit (specific to the ST206 chassis) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, extended front bumper with integrated canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler for aggressive stance and aero balance.

Custom 3-piece Work Meister S1 3P wheels (17x9 +22 front, 17x10 +30 rear) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (225/45/17 front, 255/40/17 rear) with custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 25mm rear) to fill the arches and achieve a flush fitment.

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (ST206-specific mounting brackets), a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel with a Works Bell quick-release hub, and a custom roll cage from Sabelt Japan (8-point, bolt-in) with integrated harness bar for track readiness, finished in matching TRD Silver paint.
